title: Law Offices of Michael J Gurfinkel, Inc ransomware incident

victim.name: Law Offices of Michael J Gurfinkel, Inc

extortion.description: The Law Offices of Michael J. Gurfinkel, Inc. is one of the most respected and successful immigration law firms in America. We take pride that many of our cases are considered “miracle cases” that were “emergency” in nature, or were considered “too difficult” or “impossible” by other attorneys.
